- [ ] Linked issue or epic (if applicable)

- [ ] Privacy implications considered (derived-only default, field preview accuracy)
- [ ] Claim language reviewed (no TfL endorsement; no invented statistics)
- [ ] Docs index / reading order updated (if new docs added)
